name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures numerical reasoning ability for graduate and managerial level candidates. Assesses how well candidates can work with numbers, interpret data, and draw correct conclusions from numerical information presented in tables and graphs.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures verbal reasoning ability for graduate and managerial candidates. Assesses comprehension of written passages and ability to draw logical conclusions from verbal information.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures inductive reasoning and abstract problem-solving ability. Assesses capacity to identify patterns and rules in abstract information, relevant for roles requiring logical analysis.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures deductive reasoning ability. Assesses the ability to draw logical conclusions from rules and premises, critical thinking, and systematic problem solving.

name: Verify Mechanical Comprehension
description: Assesses understanding of mechanical principles, physical forces, and how machines work. Ideal for technical, engineering, and operations roles requiring mechanical knowledge.

name: Verify Spatial Reasoning
description: Measures ability to visualize and mentally manipulate 2D and 3D shapes. Relevant for engineering, design, architecture, and technical roles.

name: Verify G+ Adaptive Ability
description: Adaptive general ability test combining numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning. Uses IRT to efficiently and accurately measure general cognitive ability across all levels.

name: OPQ32r
description: Occupational Personality Questionnaire measuring 32 personality characteristics relevant to work behavior. Predicts performance across a wide range of job roles and levels, from graduates to senior executives.

name: OPQ32n
description: Normative version of the Occupational Personality Questionnaire. Measures 32 personality dimensions linked to workplace performance and behaviors.

name: Motivation Questionnaire MQM5
description: Measures what motivates candidates and employees at work. Assesses 18 motivational dimensions to understand drivers, engagement levels, and fit with role and organizational culture.

name: Java (New)
description: Assesses knowledge and skills in Java programming including OOP concepts, data structures, algorithms, exception handling, and Java APIs. Suitable for junior to senior Java developers.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Tests knowledge of Java 8 features including lambdas, streams, Optional, new Date/Time API, and functional programming concepts. Ideal for mid-to-senior Java developers.

name: Python (New)
description: Assesses Python programming knowledge including data types, control flow, functions, OOP, libraries, and best practices. Suitable for data scientists, backend developers, and automation engineers.

name: SQL (New)
description: Evaluates SQL knowledge including SELECT statements, joins, aggregations, subqueries, and database design principles. Suitable for developers, analysts, and DBAs.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Assesses JavaScript programming skills including ES6+, async programming, DOM manipulation, closures, and modern JS frameworks knowledge.

name: .NET (New)
description: Assesses .NET framework knowledge including C#, ASP.NET, LINQ, Entity Framework, and .NET Core principles for software developer roles.

name: C++ (New)
description: Evaluates C++ programming skills including memory management, OOP, STL, templates, and modern C++11/14/17 features for systems and embedded software roles.

name: Agile (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of Agile methodologies including Scrum, Kanban, sprint planning, and agile principles. Relevant for developers, project managers, and Scrum Masters.

name: Automata Fix
description: Coding simulation where candidates debug and fix code in a realistic IDE environment. Tests debugging skills across multiple programming languages.

name: Automata Pro
description: Comprehensive coding assessment simulating a real development environment. Candidates write, run, and debug code across multiple languages. Suitable for experienced developers.

name: Entry Level Sales Solution
description: Designed for entry-level sales candidates. Combines situational judgment and personality assessment to predict sales performance and customer-facing competencies.

name: Sales Representative Solution
description: Comprehensive assessment for sales representative roles. Measures sales-specific competencies, personality, and cognitive ability to predict field and inside sales success.

name: Universal Competency Framework (UCF)
description: A comprehensive behavioral competency framework linking personality, motivations, and competencies to predict job performance. Used as a foundation for talent decisions.

name: 360 Degree Feedback
description: Multi-rater feedback tool collecting input from peers, managers, direct reports, and the individual to support leadership development and self-awareness.

name: Managerial and Graduate Item Bank (MGIB)
description: A comprehensive bank of verbal, numerical, and abstract reasoning items for managerial and graduate level assessment. Enables flexible test construction.

name: Customer Service Simulation
description: Realistic simulation assessing how candidates handle customer service interactions. Measures problem resolution, empathy, and communication skills.

name: Graduate Item Bank (GIB8)
description: Graduate-level reasoning test bank covering verbal, numerical, and diagrammatic reasoning. Suitable for high-volume graduate recruitment.

name: Scenarios
description: Situational judgment test presenting realistic workplace scenarios. Assesses judgment, decision-making, and interpersonal effectiveness across various work situations.

name: Work Strengths
description: A strength-based personality questionnaire identifying natural talents and energizers at work. Suitable for development conversations and early career assessment.

name: RemoteWorkQ
description: Measures the personality traits and motivational drivers most critical for success in remote and hybrid work environments. Assesses self-management, communication, and technology orientation.

name: Manager and Leader 8.0
description: Situational judgment test for managerial and leadership roles. Assesses how candidates handle realistic management dilemmas, team leadership, and stakeholder engagement.

name: Numerical Reasoning - Adept*Edition
description: Adaptive numerical reasoning test using Item Response Theory for precise measurement across all ability levels. Shorter and more accurate than fixed-form tests.

name: Verbal Reasoning - Adept*Edition
description: Adaptive verbal reasoning test using IRT for accurate measurement. Assesses comprehension and logical reasoning from written text.

name: Inductive Reasoning - Adept*Edition
description: Adaptive inductive/abstract reasoning test using IRT. Assesses pattern recognition and abstract problem-solving ability efficiently.

name: Apprentice 7.1 Battery
description: Battery of aptitude tests designed for apprentice and entry-level technical roles. Covers numerical, verbal, and mechanical reasoning at a level appropriate for school leavers.

name: Customer Contact Styles Questionnaire
description: Personality assessment focused on customer-facing competencies and service orientation. Predicts performance in contact center, customer service, and retail roles.

name: General Ability Battery
description: Comprehensive cognitive ability battery covering multiple reasoning domains. Used for high-volume selection across a broad range of roles and levels.

name: Technology Profession Aptitude Tests (TPAT)
description: Aptitude battery specifically designed for technology and IT roles. Covers abstract reasoning, logical analysis, and technology-relevant problem-solving.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level)
description: Advanced Java test covering multithreading, concurrency, design patterns, JVM internals, and performance optimization. For senior Java developers.

name: Spring Framework
description: Assesses knowledge of Spring Framework including Spring Boot, Spring MVC, dependency injection, AOP, and Spring Security. Suitable for Java backend developers.

name: Data Analysis
description: Assesses data analysis skills including statistical analysis, data interpretation, and analytical reasoning. Suitable for data analyst and business analyst roles.

name: Cyber Security Awareness
description: Evaluates cybersecurity knowledge including threat identification, secure coding practices, and information security fundamentals. For IT and developer roles.

name: Microsoft Office
description: Tests proficiency in Microsoft Office suite including Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook. Relevant for administrative, clerical, and office support roles.

name: Administrative Professional Solution
description: Comprehensive assessment for administrative and professional support roles. Includes verbal reasoning, office skills, and personality relevant to organization and communication.

name: Call Center Simulation
description: Interactive simulation replicating call center scenarios. Assesses multitasking, listening, data entry accuracy, and customer handling in a realistic environment.

name: Graduate Management Aptitude Test
description: Cognitive ability assessment for graduate management programs and early career management roles. Covers numerical, verbal, and analytical reasoning.

name: Global Skills Assessment (GSA)
description: Measures cognitive abilities and work-related behavioral preferences in a global context. Designed for international talent assessment across cultures and languages.

name: Workplace English Language Test (WELT)
description: Assesses English language proficiency in workplace contexts including reading, writing, listening, and speaking relevant to professional roles.

name: Retail Sales Associate Solution
description: Assessment designed for retail sales associate roles. Measures customer service orientation, sales behaviors, and personality traits predictive of retail success.

name: Leadership Assessment
description: Comprehensive leadership potential assessment combining personality, cognitive ability, and situational judgment. Predicts leadership effectiveness across organizational levels.

name: Team Effectiveness
description: Assesses team-related behaviors and preferences. Identifies team role preferences, collaboration style, and group dynamics orientation.

name: Dependability and Safety Instrument
description: Assesses reliability, dependability, and safety-conscious behaviors. Predicts integrity, rule-following, and counterproductive work behavior risk.

name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ) Short Version
description: Shortened version of the OPQ measuring key personality dimensions in less time. Ideal for high-volume screening where full assessment is not warranted at early stages.

name: Numerical Reasoning Test (Operational)
description: Numerical reasoning test designed for operational and administrative level roles. Simpler than managerial-level tests, covering basic data interpretation and calculation.

name: Verbal Reasoning Test (Operational)
description: Verbal reasoning test for operational roles. Measures comprehension and language use at a level suitable for clerical, customer service, and administrative positions.

name: Smart Interview Live
description: Live structured interview solution with AI-powered scoring and interviewer guidance. Standardizes interview processes and reduces bias in hiring decisions.

name: Smart Interview On Demand
description: Asynchronous video interview tool where candidates record responses to pre-set questions. Reviewed and scored by assessors at a later time.

name: Hogan Personality Inventory (HPI)
description: Measures bright-side personality characteristics predicting job performance and leadership potential. Assesses how individuals behave when at their best.

name: Calculation Tests
description: Assesses accuracy and speed of numerical calculations. Suitable for clerical, finance, and data-entry roles requiring precise arithmetic.

name: Checking Tests
description: Assesses clerical checking accuracy including comparing names, numbers, and codes. Critical for roles requiring attention to detail and data accuracy.

name: Graduate Battery - Verbal Critical Reasoning
description: Verbal critical reasoning test for graduate selection. Assesses ability to evaluate arguments and draw logical conclusions from complex text.

name: SJT - Professional Services
description: Situational judgment test for professional services roles including consulting, legal, finance, and advisory positions. Measures judgment in client-facing and complex work contexts.

name: Raven's Progressive Matrices
description: Classic non-verbal abstract reasoning test measuring general cognitive ability through pattern recognition in matrices. Culture-fair and language-neutral.

name: Operational Temperament Questionnaire
description: Personality questionnaire designed for operational, technical, and trades roles. Measures work-relevant behavioral styles for frontline and manual workers.
